$curated: State-composition gate for game-typing (Template B — game-typing.gen.json maps mx-node:game-typing/meaning to MxCard, but the FE renders it as a Material Card (typing_game.dart), so there is 0 real MxCard-keyed widget here — like library; a Template-A cast<MxCard>() would throw). Assert the keyed CONTAINER set per state; never cast. Chrome (screen/appbar, carried by the SHARED game_screen.dart per request.type) is excluded from the gate universe (matches dashboard.states.json). Two node-sets are reachable in the FE: the answering branch (_checkedWrong=false → meaning+hint+check) and the just-wrong branch (_checkedWrong=true → meaning+retry+accept). waiting/typing/hint SHARE the answering node-set: typing only changes _controller.text (no keyed node) and hint only sets _showHint=true which appends an UNKEYED Text; all three keep meaning+hint+check. They are kept as distinct driven states here so the test proves the node-set is invariant under the typing and hint actions. wrong is the real discriminator (hint/check disappear, retry/accept appear). COVERAGE GAPS (not gated): correct (markCorrect drops the card and jumps straight to the next card or completes — the FE has no intermediate 'answered, awaiting Next' node-set; the kit's game-typing/next is not keyed in the FE), complete (_complete() renders MxContentBounds/Column with gamePlayAgain keyed Key('gamePlayAgain'), not mx-node:game-typing/*, so there is no keyed body node to gate). Identity-rollout gaps (kit nodes not keyed in the FE): game-typing/next, /input (TextField Key('typingField')), /progress (LinearProgressIndicator), /back, /options, /complete. Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/game/game_typing_states_test.dart.
